untranslatable_reason: Signal requires microstructure-specific metrics (bid-ask spread percentile, limit order execution probability, order flow imbalance) that are not available in the allowed indicator set. vol_ratio_20 is used as a proxy for liquidity conditions, and price_pos_20 as a proxy for order flow directionality, but these are imperfect substitutes for true spread and order imbalance measurements.
translation_notes: Context-dependent direction mapped to both LONG and SHORT entry conditions based on order flow direction (price_pos_20 relative to 50th percentile). Execution probability threshold (55%) and order imbalance minimum (0.55) mapped to price_pos_20 thresholds. Spread percentile threshold (45th) approximated using vol_ratio_20 as a liquidity proxy. Hold period set to 1 day as signal emphasizes immediate market order execution. Stop loss set conservatively at 1.5% given tight spread environment.
